title: sphaeralcea rivularis subsp. cismontana
intro: Sphaeralcea rivularis subsp. cismontana, also known as desert marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of desert marigold include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Desert marigold can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to natural health and wellness routines.
